description: omo-agents lifecycle hooks: todo-continuation enforcement, edit/json error recovery, empty task response detection, task reminder, dangerous command interception, post-edit LSP reminder, write-existing-file-guard, comment-checker, context-window-monitor, session-id-reminder, bash-file-read-guard, compaction-context-injector

hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const todos=(h.tool_response&&h.tool_response.todos)||[];const inProgress=todos.filter(x=>x.status==='in_progress');const incomplete=todos.filter(x=>x.status!=='completed'&&x.status!=='cancelled');if(inProgress.length>0){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚡ Task IN PROGRESS: "'+inProgress[0].content+'". Do NOT stop. Continue immediately to complete it.
- Proceed without asking for permission
- Mark each task complete when finished
- Do not stop until all tasks are done
- If you believe all work is already complete, the system is questioning your completion claim. Critically re-examine each todo item from a skeptical perspective, verify the work was actually done correctly, and update the todo list accordingly.
');}else if(incomplete.length>0){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] '+incomplete.length+' todo(s) remaining. Continue to next pending task. Do NOT stop.
');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const f=(h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.file_path||h.tool_input.path))||'file';process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] File edited: '+f+'. Remember to check LSP diagnostics for type errors before marking task complete.
');const newStr=(h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.new_string||h.tool_input.content))||'';if(newStr&&!/\.(test|spec|md)$/.test(f)){const lines=newStr.split('
');const commentLines=lines.filter(l=>/^\s*(//|#|\*)/.test(l)).length;const ratio=lines.length>10?commentLines/lines.length:0;if(ratio>0.4){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ High comment ratio ('+Math.round(ratio*100)+'%). Avoid excessive comments — code should be self-documenting.
');}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const usage=h.usage||h.tool_response&&h.tool_response.usage;if(usage&&usage.input_tokens&&usage.context_window){const ratio=usage.input_tokens/usage.context_window;if(ratio>=0.75){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ CONTEXT WINDOW: '+Math.round(ratio*100)+'% used ('+usage.input_tokens+'/'+usage.context_window+' tokens). You still have context remaining — continue working, do NOT skip tasks or summarize prematurely.\n');}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const out=(h.tool_response&&(typeof h.tool_response==='string'?h.tool_response:h.tool_response.output||JSON.stringify(h.tool_response)))||'';const m=out.match(/session[_-]id[:\s="']+([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)/i);if(m&&m[1]){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] 💾 session_id='+m[1]+'. STORE THIS. For follow-ups/fixes use: task(session_id="'+m[1]+'", ...). Saves 70%+ tokens vs restarting.
');}if(!out.trim()){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ Task invocation returned EMPTY response. The call has already COMPLETED — you are NOT waiting. Agent either failed to execute or did not terminate correctly. Proceed accordingly.
');return;}const isErr=out.includes('[ERROR]')||out.includes('Invalid arguments');if(isErr){const patterns=[{p:'run_in_background',t:'missing_run_in_background',fix:'Add run_in_background=false (delegation) or run_in_background=true (parallel exploration)'},{p:'load_skills',t:'missing_load_skills',fix:'Add load_skills=[] parameter (empty array if no skills needed)'},{p:'category OR subagent_type',t:'mutual_exclusion',fix:'Provide ONLY one of: category (e.g., general) OR subagent_type (e.g., oracle, explore)'},{p:'Must provide either category or subagent_type',t:'missing_category_or_agent',fix:'Add either category="general" OR subagent_type="explore"'},{p:'Unknown category',t:'unknown_category',fix:'Use a valid category from the Available list in the error message'},{p:'Agent name cannot be empty',t:'empty_agent',fix:'Provide a non-empty subagent_type value'},{p:'Unknown agent',t:'unknown_agent',fix:'Use a valid agent from the Available agents list in the error message'},{p:'Cannot call primary agent',t:'primary_agent',fix:'Primary agents cannot be called via task. Use a subagent like explore, oracle, or librarian'},{p:'Skills not found',t:'unknown_skills',fix:'Use valid skill names from the Available list in the error message'}];const hit=patterns.find(x=>out.includes(x.p));if(hit){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ❌ Task CALL FAILED ('+hit.t+')
Fix: '+hit.fix+'
Retry NOW with corrected parameters. Example: task(description="...",prompt="...",category="unspecified-low",run_in_background=false,load_skills=[])
');}else{process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ Task delegation ERROR detected. Review error message and retry with corrected parameters.
');}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const out=(h.tool_response&&(typeof h.tool_response==='string'?h.tool_response:JSON.stringify(h.tool_response)))||'';const outLow=out.toLowerCase();const EDIT_ERRORS=['oldstring and newstring must be different','oldstring not found','oldstring found multiple times'];const hit=EDIT_ERRORS.find(p=>outLow.includes(p));if(hit){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ❌ EDIT ERROR — IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED

You made an Edit mistake. STOP and do this NOW:
1. READ the file immediately to see its ACTUAL current state
2. VERIFY what the content really looks like (your assumption was wrong)
3. CONTINUE with corrected action based on the real file content

DO NOT attempt another edit until you have read and verified the file state.
');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),path=require('path');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const tool=(h.tool_name||'').toLowerCase();const TODO_TOOLS=new Set(['todowrite','task_create','task_update','task_list']);const counterFile=path.join(os.tmpdir(),'omo-task-reminder-'+process.env.SESSION_ID||'default');if(TODO_TOOLS.has(tool)){fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,'0','utf8');return;}let count=0;try{count=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(counterFile,'utf8')||'0',10)||0;}catch(e){}count++;if(count>=10){fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,'0','utf8');process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] \uD83D\uDCCB Task tools not used in 10+ tool calls. If you are tracking work, use TodoWrite to record progress and mark tasks complete.\n');}else{fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,String(count),'utf8');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'),os=require('os'),path=require('path');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const tool=h.tool_name||'';const input=JSON.stringify(h.tool_input||{});const key=tool+'|'+input;const rawId=process.env.SESSION_ID||'default';const safeId=rawId.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,'_').slice(0,64);const f=path.join(os.tmpdir(),'omo-doom-loop-'+safeId);let hist=[];try{hist=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));}catch(e){}hist.push(key);if(hist.length>10)hist=hist.slice(-10);fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(hist),'utf8');const THRESHOLD=3;if(hist.length>=THRESHOLD){const last=hist.slice(-THRESHOLD);if(last.every(x=>x===last[0])){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️ DOOM LOOP DETECTED: The tool "'+tool+'" has been called '+THRESHOLD+' times in a row with identical parameters.
This suggests you are stuck in a loop. STOP and reconsider your approach:
1. Examine WHY the repeated calls are not working
2. Try a completely different strategy
3. Ask the oracle agent for architectural guidance if needed
4. If the task is genuinely impossible, report to the user
');}}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(h.tool_input&&h.tool_input.command)||'';const dangerous=[/rm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*r)\s+/i,/rm\s+-[rRfF]+\s*[\*\.]/,/git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force|--force-with-lease)/,/curl\s+.*\|\s*(sh|bash|zsh)/,/wget\s+.*-O\s*-\s*\|\s*(sh|bash)/,/DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)\s/i,/chmod\s+(-R\s+)?[0-7]*7[0-7][0-7]\s+(-R\s+)?/,/mkfs\./,/dd\s+if=.*of=/dev/];const hit=dangerous.find(p=>p.test(cmd));if(hit){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️  DANGEROUS COMMAND DETECTED: '+cmd.slice(0,120)+'
This command matches a dangerous pattern. Please confirm you intend to run this.
');process.exit(1);}if(/^\s*(cat|head|tail|less|more)\s+[^|&;]+\.(ts|js|json|md|py|go|rs|java|txt|yaml|yml)\s*$/.test(cmd)){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] 💡 TIP: For reading source files, prefer the Read tool over bash cat/head/tail. Read tool provides better context and line numbers.
');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const fp=h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.file_path||h.tool_input.path);if(fp&&fs.existsSync(fp)){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️  WRITE-GUARD: \"'+fp+'\" already exists. You should READ the file first before overwriting it. Use Edit instead of Write for existing files to preserve context.\n');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] COMPACTION CONTEXT INJECTION

When summarizing this session, you MUST include ALL of the following 8 sections:

## 1. User Requests (As-Is)
- List all original user requests exactly as stated
- Preserve the user exact wording and intent

## 2. Final Goal
- What the user ultimately wanted to achieve
- The end result or deliverable expected

## 3. Work Completed
- What has been done so far
- Files created/modified
- Features implemented
- Problems solved

## 4. Remaining Tasks
- What still needs to be done
- Pending items from the original request
- Follow-up tasks identified during the work

## 5. Active Working Context (For Seamless Continuation)
- Files: Paths of files currently being edited or frequently referenced
- Code in Progress: Key code snippets, function signatures, or data structures under active development
- External References: Documentation URLs, library APIs, or external resources being consulted
- State and Variables: Important variable names, configuration values, or runtime state relevant to ongoing work

## 6. Explicit Constraints (Verbatim Only)
- Include ONLY constraints explicitly stated by the user or in existing AGENTS.md context
- Quote constraints verbatim (do not paraphrase)
- Do NOT invent, add, or modify constraints
- If no explicit constraints exist, write None

## 7. Agent Verification State (Critical for Reviewers)
- Current Agent: What agent is running
- Verification Progress: Files already verified/validated
- Pending Verifications: Files still needing verification
- Previous Rejections: What was rejected and why
- Acceptance Status: Current state of review process

## 8. Delegated Agent Sessions
- List ALL background agent tasks spawned during this session
- For each: agent name, category, status, description, and session_id
- RESUME DO NOT RESTART: Each listed session retains full context. After compaction, use session_id to continue existing agent sessions instead of spawning new ones. This saves tokens, preserves learned context, and prevents duplicate work.
')"
